name: Meltaway Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream all ingredients together well.
2. Roll into two logs and wrap in wax paper.
3. Refrigerate for 2 hours or overnight.
4. Slice into 1/4 inch thick pieces.
5. Bake on an ungreased sheet at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until very light brown.
6. Dust with powdered sugar.
